name: Strawberry Shortcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare one of the fillings below.
2. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
3. Mix baking mix, sugar, margarine or butter, and milk in a bowl until a soft dough forms.
4. Drop dough into 6 muffin molds on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 11-12 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Beat whipping cream and additional sugar in a chilled medium bowl on high speed until stiff.
7. Split warm shortcakes; fill with the prepared filling and top with whipped cream.
6 servings.
Strawberry Filling:
- Sliced strawberries (4 cups)
- Sugar (2/3 cup)
Three-Berry Filling
- Sliced strawberries (2 cups)
- Fresh raspberries or frozen raspberries, thawed and drained (1 cup)
- Blueberries (fresh or frozen, thawed) (1 cup)
- Sugar (1/4 cup)
Strawberry Peach Filling
- Sliced strawberries (2 cups)
- Unsweetened sliced peaches, thawed (2 cups)
- Sugar (1/3 cup)
